title: [codereview] coap/Kconfig: LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP should select COAP_URI_WILDCARD for query param support (?node=...)
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/Kconfig:257 - Dead drop GET uses query param per epic example. KEYS and MSG configs select COAP_URI_WILDCARD. Without it, URI parsing for query will fail. Also discovered-from:project-LICHEN-p3dm
